monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles at Kuwait, Bahrain; Explosions Near Airbase Reported in Kuwait
US Airstrike Hits School in Tehran, Kills Nearly 200
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 6h ago. A US airstrike struck a school in Tehran, killing nearly 200 children and adults, according to CNN sources, amid ongoing US strikes on Iran.
US Airstrikes Hit Iranian Air Defenses and IRGC Speedboats in Southern Iran After Hormuz Attacks
Iran Says IRGC Shot Down US MQ-9 Drone Over Khormuj, Bushehr Province
— S3 · Conflict · Khormuj, Iran · 2h ago. IRGC claims its air defense shot down a U.S. MQ-9 Reaper drone over Khormuj, southern Iran, during overnight U.S. airstrikes.
